title: Semiconductor Engineer
description:
Semiconductor Engineer - Probe Card Room


Key Responsibilities:

  • OJT provided
  • Liaise and follow up with Product Engineering Department to resolve probe card issues and improve testing yield performance.
  • To prepare, review and implement operational procedures in accordance to the technical specifications and/or customer’s requirements
  • Communicate with Headquarter, customer and vendor on probe card related matter
  • In the spirit of continuous improvement, you are required to work closely with customers, vendor and production to meet the quality requirements
  • Produce daily report
  • Analyse probe card data and generate report for management review
  • Responsible in responding to customer’s queries on timely manner
  • Responsible in PRVX operation and maintenance, and create reference files for probe card
  • Review and update SOP or OI to align with current practice or specification
  • Source for supplies and issue PR
  • Any ad-hoc tasks that may be assigned by the management

Job Specification:

  • Min. Diploma in Electrical/ Electronics Engineering
  • Required language(s): English, Mandarin (in order to understand documents written in Chinese and coordinate with English and Mandarin speaking Headquarter, customers and vendors in regards with the probe card issues and other probe card related matters.)
  • Proficient in Microsoft Word, Excel and Power Point for report generation and presentation
  • Good analytical and interpersonal skills

Recruit and select employees on the basis of merit (such as skills, experience or ability to perform the job), and regardless of age, race, gender, religion, marital status and family responsibilities, or disability.

postedCompany.description:
Founded in Jun 2006, Ardentec Singapore Pte Ltd is an extended arm of our parent company – Ardentec Corporation Taiwan as a strategic subsidiary in South East Asia, providing professional semiconductor testing services to our regional customers with shorter cycle time, engineering capabilities, technical innovations, and our people’s endeavors and passion.

While pursuing operational excellence, we mindfully strategize in building a sustainable business to achieve profitability, care for our people, community and environment - People, Profit & Planet, they can co-exist without compromising any one of them.

We are proud to be the first in the industry to attain ISO14064, Green House Gas Management System in 2012. Our much efforts are putting into various activities to demonstrate our commitment towards a greener environment.

Activities in paying forward to our community not only involves our people, but also extends to the family and friends to cultivate the sense of responsibility towards resource and habitat preservation. 

We continuously focus on developing our people and encouraging them to express their thoughts and emotions while feeling safe in doing so.  We want to hear them and value their inputs on how to march forward together in building a stronger Ardentec that benefits out society at large.

P.A.I.R.S. (Persistent, Accountable, Innovative, Resilient & Sustainable) is our aspiration and it compasses us to do better and we are excited to continue to march towards our sustainable future.
postedCompany.name: ARDENTEC SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
